title: Truck accident near Herolds Bay turnoff
description: GEORGE NEWS & VIDEO - A truck that was...
bodyText:
Video

GEORGE NEWS & VIDEO - A truck that was transporting boat outboard engines, among others, was involved in an accident on the N2 highway at the turn-off to Herolds Bay.

The number of occupants and their injuries have not yet been established.


> It appears that the truck connected with the road barrier on the left side marking the start of construction area, before swerving across the road and coming to a standstill.


No other vehicles were involved in the incident.

VIDEO: On the scene of the accident:

Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

The damaged bakkie.

Photos: Jacques du Toit

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
